description: Eval prompts for Self-Cognitive meta skill

evals.name: preflight-verification
evals.prompt: I'm about to deploy a major database migration that restructures our user tables. It affects 10M+ users and has no rollback script. Can you do a confidence check on this deployment plan?
evals.notes: Tests preflight verification mode. Should trigger structured self-cognitive response with Goal, Current context, Verification (Assumptions, Risks, Checks, Confidence), Lessons learned, and Persistable updates sections. Must include the JSON artifact.

evals.name: postflight-retro
evals.prompt: We just had a production outage for 2 hours because the auth service couldn't handle the traffic spike during the product launch. The cache layer failed and auth tokens expired prematurely. Can you help me do a postmortem and capture lessons learned?
evals.notes: Tests postflight retro mode. Should capture technical, process, and prompting/coordination lessons. Should include specific failure analysis and actionable improvements.

evals.name: skill-extraction
evals.prompt: I've been manually running the same 5-step process for onboarding new team members for the past 6 months. I want to make this repeatable so any lead can do it consistently. The steps are: 1) Create dev environment access, 2) Walk through codebase structure, 3) Assign first ticket, 4) Pair on first PR, 5) Schedule 1-on-1 feedback. Can you help me turn this into a skill?
evals.notes: Tests skill extraction mode. Should propose a skill structure with name, description, and workflow. Should identify what makes this repeatable and what context is needed.
